race.comment: EFFORTLESSLY (7) finished off from a long way back to be 1.3L off the winner first-up from a break. She'll be fitter for that run and she picked up close to her best. Remaining at 1200m is a little query, but she looks a nice filly on the way up and with improvement likely, she makes plenty of appeal. LE FEM LE CHOIX (9) was sound on debut at Northam before going for a break. Her latest trial coming into this was very impressive and Steve Parnham hops on board for her return. Should get every chance and can put her best foot forward. BONDITRAM (2) gets Chris Parnham today replacing the apprentice hoop and will go close. JIMMY ANGEL (1) can be in the finish on resumption.
